zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Malet於大約1440年出生在英國薩默塞特時，她的父親Hugh Malet52歲，母親Joan Roynon40歲。她於大約1473年與Robert Brent在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1511年享年72歲。

nameMeanings.name: Malet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname from a diminutive of Mal ‘bad’ or from a derivative of the related Old French word maleit ‘accursed’ (see Mallet 1). Compare Malette .
French: from the Old French personal name Malet, a pet form of Malo (compare Mallet 2).

variants.name: Mal
meanings: Slovenian: nickname for a physically small man, from mal ‘small, little’.

variants.name: Malette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Alphonse, Francois, Jacques, Rejean, Serge.
French: variant or feminine form of Malet and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this, reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Malet was born about 1440, in Somerset, England, her father, Hugh Malet, was 52 and her mother, Joan Roynon, was 40. She married Robert Brent about 1473, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1511, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Malet est née environ 1440, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Malet, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Joan Roynon, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Brent environ 1473, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1511, à l’âge de 72 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Malet(이)가 대략 1440년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Malet(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Roynon(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1473년 영국 서머세트에서 Robert Brent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1511년 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Malet родилась около 1440 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh Malet было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Roynon, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Brent около 1473 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1511 г. в возрасте 72 лет.
